article_title: Safety Belts and Inflatable Restraint Systems
text: Section 27315 applies to any person in a fully enclosed three-wheeled motor vehicle that is not less than seven feet in length and not less than four feet in width, and has an unladen weight of 900 pounds or more.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 12. EQUIPMENT OF VEHICLES [24000 - 28244]
### Chapter 5. Other Equipment [27000 - 28160]
#### Article 3. Safety Belts and Inflatable Restraint Systems [27302 - 27319]
##### § 27315.1

Section 27315 applies to any person in a fully enclosed three-wheeled motor vehicle that is not less than seven feet in length and not less than four feet in width, and has an unladen weight of 900 pounds or more.

*(Added by Stats. 1997, Ch. 710, Sec. 2. Effective January 1, 1998.)*
